commands.description: Build an image from a Dockerfile

tokens.name: PATH
tokens.description: Build context path, URL, or - for stdin

tokens.name: --add-host
tokens.description: Add a custom host-to-IP mapping (format: "host:ip")

tokens.name: --build-arg
tokens.description: Set build-time variables

tokens.name: --build-context
tokens.description: Additional build contexts (e.g., name=path)

tokens.name: --builder
tokens.description: Override the configured builder instance

tokens.name: --cache-from
tokens.description: External cache sources (e.g., "user/app:cache", "type=local,src=path/to/dir")

tokens.name: --cache-to
tokens.description: Cache export destinations (e.g., "user/app:cache", "type=local,dest=path/to/dir")

tokens.name: --cgroup-parent
tokens.description: Set the parent cgroup for the RUN instructions during build

tokens.name: --check
tokens.description: Shorthand for --call=check

tokens.name: --debug
tokens.description: Enable debug logging

tokens.name: --file
tokens.description: Name of the Dockerfile (default: "PATH/Dockerfile")

tokens.name: --iidfile
tokens.description: Write the image ID to a file

tokens.name: --label
tokens.description: Set metadata for an image

tokens.name: --load
tokens.description: Shorthand for --output=type=docker

tokens.name: --metadata-file
tokens.description: Write build result metadata to a file

tokens.name: --network
tokens.description: Set the networking mode for the RUN instructions during build

tokens.name: --no-cache
tokens.description: Do not use cache when building the image

tokens.name: --no-cache-filter
tokens.description: Do not cache specified stages

tokens.name: --output
tokens.description: Output destination (format: "type=local,dest=path")

tokens.name: --platform
tokens.description: Set target platform for build (e.g., linux/amd64, linux/arm64)

tokens.name: --progress
tokens.description: Set type of progress output

tokens.name: --provenance
tokens.description: Shorthand for --attest=type=provenance

tokens.name: --pull
tokens.description: Always attempt to pull all referenced images

tokens.name: --push
tokens.description: Shorthand for --output=type=registry

tokens.name: --quiet
tokens.description: Suppress the build output and print image ID on success

tokens.name: --sbom
tokens.description: Shorthand for --attest=type=sbom

tokens.name: --secret
tokens.description: Secret to expose to the build (format: "id=mysecret[,src=/local/secret]")

tokens.name: --shm-size
tokens.description: Shared memory size for build containers

tokens.name: --ssh
tokens.description: SSH agent socket or keys to expose to the build

tokens.name: --tag
tokens.description: Image identifier (format: "[registry/]repository[:tag]")

tokens.name: --target
tokens.description: Set the target build stage to build

tokens.name: --ulimit
tokens.description: Ulimit options

tokens.name: --allow
tokens.description: Allow extra privileged entitlement (e.g., "network.host", "security.insecure")

tokens.name: --annotation
tokens.description: Add annotation to the image

tokens.name: --attest
tokens.description: Attestation parameters (format: "type=sbom,generator=image")

tokens.name: --call
tokens.description: Set method for evaluating build

commands.description: Create and run a new container from an image

tokens.name: IMAGE
tokens.description: Image to run

tokens.name: COMMAND
tokens.description: Command to run inside the container

tokens.name: --name
tokens.description: Assign a name to the container

tokens.name: --detach
tokens.description: Run container in background and print container ID

tokens.name: --interactive
tokens.description: Keep STDIN open even if not attached

tokens.name: --tty
tokens.description: Allocate a pseudo-TTY

tokens.name: --rm
tokens.description: Automatically remove the container when it exits

tokens.name: --env
tokens.description: Set environment variables

tokens.name: --env-file
tokens.description: Read in a file of environment variables

tokens.name: --publish
tokens.description: Publish a container's port(s) to the host

tokens.name: --publish-all
tokens.description: Publish all exposed ports to random ports

tokens.name: --volume
tokens.description: Bind mount a volume

tokens.name: --mount
tokens.description: Attach a filesystem mount to the container

tokens.name: --network
tokens.description: Connect a container to a network

tokens.name: --workdir
tokens.description: Working directory inside the container

tokens.name: --user
tokens.description: Username or UID (format: <name|uid>[:<group|gid>])

tokens.name: --entrypoint
tokens.description: Overwrite the default ENTRYPOINT of the image

tokens.name: --hostname
tokens.description: Container host name

tokens.name: --add-host
tokens.description: Add a custom host-to-IP mapping (host:ip)

tokens.name: --dns
tokens.description: Set custom DNS servers

tokens.name: --expose
tokens.description: Expose a port or a range of ports

tokens.name: --label
tokens.description: Set meta data on a container

tokens.name: --memory
tokens.description: Memory limit

tokens.name: --memory-swap
tokens.description: Swap limit equal to memory plus swap: '-1' to enable unlimited swap

tokens.name: --cpus
tokens.description: Number of CPUs

tokens.name: --cpu-shares
tokens.description: CPU shares (relative weight)

tokens.name: --platform
tokens.description: Set platform if server is multi-platform capable

tokens.name: --privileged
tokens.description: Give extended privileges to this container

tokens.name: --pull
tokens.description: Pull image before running

tokens.name: --quiet
tokens.description: Suppress the pull output

tokens.name: --read-only
tokens.description: Mount the container's root filesystem as read only

tokens.name: --restart
tokens.description: Restart policy to apply when a container exits

tokens.name: --runtime
tokens.description: Runtime to use for this container

tokens.name: --security-opt
tokens.description: Security options

tokens.name: --shm-size
tokens.description: Size of /dev/shm

tokens.name: --stop-signal
tokens.description: Signal to stop the container

tokens.name: --stop-timeout
tokens.description: Timeout (in seconds) to stop a container

tokens.name: --tmpfs
tokens.description: Mount a tmpfs directory

tokens.name: --volumes-from
tokens.description: Mount volumes from the specified container(s)

tokens.name: --volume-driver
tokens.description: Optional volume driver for the container

tokens.name: --cap-add
tokens.description: Add Linux capabilities

tokens.name: --cap-drop
tokens.description: Drop Linux capabilities

tokens.name: --device
tokens.description: Add a host device to the container

tokens.name: --gpus
tokens.description: GPU devices to add to the container ('all' to pass all GPUs)

tokens.name: --init
tokens.description: Run an init inside the container that forwards signals and reaps processes

tokens.name: --pid
tokens.description: PID namespace to use

tokens.name: --ipc
tokens.description: IPC mode to use

tokens.name: --cidfile
tokens.description: Write the container ID to the file

tokens.name: --log-driver
tokens.description: Logging driver for the container

tokens.name: --log-opt
tokens.description: Log driver options

tokens.name: --no-healthcheck
tokens.description: Disable any container-specified HEALTHCHECK

tokens.name: --health-cmd
tokens.description: Command to run to check health

tokens.name: --health-interval
tokens.description: Time between running the check (ms|s|m|h)

tokens.name: --health-retries
tokens.description: Consecutive failures needed to report unhealthy

tokens.name: --health-timeout
tokens.description: Maximum time to allow one check to run (ms|s|m|h)

tokens.name: --attach
tokens.description: Attach to STDIN, STDOUT or STDERR

tokens.name: --detach-keys
tokens.description: Override the key sequence for detaching a container

tokens.name: --network-alias
tokens.description: Add network-scoped alias for the container

tokens.name: --oom-kill-disable
tokens.description: Disable OOM Killer

tokens.name: --sig-proxy
tokens.description: Proxy received signals to the process

tokens.name: --use-api-socket
tokens.description: Bind mount Docker API socket and required auth

commands.description: Fetch the logs of a container

tokens.name: CONTAINER
tokens.description: Container name or ID

tokens.description: Show extra details provided to logs

tokens.name: --follow
tokens.description: Follow log output

tokens.name: --since
tokens.description: Show logs since timestamp (e.g. "2013-01-02T13:23:37Z") or relative (e.g. "42m")

tokens.name: --tail
tokens.description: Number of lines to show from the end of the logs (default "all")

tokens.name: --timestamps
tokens.description: Show timestamps

tokens.name: --until
tokens.description: Show logs before a timestamp (e.g. "2013-01-02T13:23:37Z") or relative (e.g. "42m")
